overall.description: First-person exploration of a gothic castle corridor and dormitory in a video game. The player walks through misty arched hallways with green stained glass ceilings, enters a Slytherin-style dormitory with four-poster beds and green velvet canopies, then exits back to the corridor toward a staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic corridor with vaulted stained glass ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the corridor toward the wooden door at the end

gothic pointed stone arch framing the corridor end
ornate wall-mounted lantern casting warm yellow light
ornate wall-mounted lantern casting warm yellow light

decorative black metal railing with gold accents along the corridor edge
intricate geometric patterned marble tiling in brown and beige tones
large dark wooden door with stained glass panels and curved iron handle

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow gothic corridor with a vaulted ceiling featuring green stained glass arches. Warm light from wall sconces illuminates the patterned marble floor and ornate railings as the player approaches a large wooden door at the end of the hallway.

events.description: opens wooden door and enters the dormitory room
pans around to survey the dormitory interior and examine the beds

agents.ego_description: entering the dormitory and looking around at the beds and furniture, exploring the room

entered.detail: ornate wooden four-poster beds with dark wood frames and green velvet canopies
heavy green draped curtains hanging from the bed frames
antique black cast iron heating stove with glowing red embers inside
antique wooden writing desk with stacked books, quill, and parchment
tall brass floor lamp with glowing white glass shade
large decorative tapestries with floral and nature scenes hanging on stone walls
sculpture of an owl perched on a wooden stand near a bed

segments.scene_description: Upon entering the spacious dormitory, the player reveals a room with multiple four-poster beds draped in green velvet canopies. The warm interior features antique wooden furniture, tapestries, and a central heating stove as the player pans around to explore the space.

events.description: exits the dormitory back into the corridor
encounters a student in dark robes walking in the corridor

agents.ego_description: exiting the dormitory and walking back through the misty corridor toward the stairs

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking toward the camera through the corridor

entered.detail: green-tinted stained glass panels forming a vaulted ceiling arch
gothic pointed stone arch framing the corridor
decorative black metal railing with gold accents
decorative black metal railing with gold accents
stone staircase leading upward illuminated by warm light at the top

segments.scene_description: The player exits the dormitory and returns to the gothic corridor, walking past the ornate railings and stained glass arches. A student in dark robes appears walking in the opposite direction, and the player continues toward a stone staircase visible at the far end of the hallway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow gothic corridor into a lavish dormitory and back again. It begins by moving through a vaulted hallway where warm wall sconces illuminate patterned marble floors and green stained glass arches, leading directly toward a large wooden door. As the camera passes through the doorway, the space expands into a spacious dormitory filled with four-poster beds draped in green velvet canopies, antique wooden furniture, and a central heating stove. The scene then shifts as the camera exits the room and returns to the gothic corridor, passing the ornate railings once more. Finally, the camera moves past a student in dark robes and continues toward a stone staircase visible at the far end of the hallway.
